name: Sales Contact
description: Track sales prospects and customers with relationship intelligence for personalized outreach and pipeline management

properties.name: Company Domain
properties.description: Company website domain for cross-entity linking

properties.name: Department
properties.description: Department (Engineering, Sales, Marketing, Operations, Executive, Finance, Legal)

properties.name: Decision Maker
properties.description: Is this person a budget or purchase decision authority?

properties.name: Lead Source
properties.description: How this contact entered the pipeline

properties.name: Last Contacted
properties.description: Date of most recent outreach or interaction

name: Company
description: Account-level intelligence for B2B sales, customer success, and expansion tracking

properties.name: Contract End Date
properties.description: Current contract or subscription renewal date

properties.name: Expansion Signals
properties.description: AI-detected signals indicating upsell or expansion potential

properties.name: Tech Stack
properties.description: Key tools and platforms in use at this account

name: Support Ticket
description: Customer support request tracking with sentiment and resolution intelligence

properties.name: Customer Email
properties.description: Email of the customer who submitted the ticket

name: Product User
description: Usage intelligence for SaaS and app products -- feature adoption, engagement depth, and expansion signals

properties.name: Features Used
properties.description: Feature keys or names the user has adopted

properties.name: Usage Frequency
properties.description: How often the user is active in the product

properties.name: Power User
properties.description: True if the user is in the top engagement tier

properties.name: API Calls (30d)
properties.description: API calls made in the last 30 days (for developer/API products)

properties.name: Integration Count
properties.description: Number of connected integrations or third-party tools

properties.name: Onboarding Complete
properties.description: Has the user completed the core onboarding flow?

name: Candidate
description: Recruiting pipeline tracking with skills, preferences, and relationship intelligence for personalized outreach

properties.name: Years Experience
properties.description: Total years of relevant professional experience

properties.name: Interview Stage
properties.description: Current stage in the recruiting pipeline

properties.name: Source Channel
properties.description: How this candidate entered the pipeline

name: Patient
description: Patient engagement tracking for healthcare platforms -- engagement, care plan status, and communication preferences (never raw PHI)

properties.name: Patient ID
properties.description: Internal patient identifier (never SSN or MRN)

properties.name: Email
properties.description: Contact email for portal and communications

properties.name: Engagement Score
properties.description: 0-100 composite engagement score across portal, appointments, and messaging

name: E-Commerce Customer
description: Shopper profile for DTC and retail -- purchase history, loyalty, and preference intelligence for personalized marketing

properties.name: Price Sensitivity
properties.description: Inferred price preference from purchase patterns

properties.name: Return Rate
properties.description: Percentage of orders that included a return

name: SaaS Account
description: B2B SaaS account record combining contract, health, and relationship data for CS and expansion workflows

properties.name: Domain
properties.description: Primary domain for cross-entity linking with contacts

properties.name: ARR Band
properties.description: Annual recurring revenue range -- never exact amounts

properties.name: Health Score
properties.description: 0-100 account health composite (usage + engagement + support sentiment)
